summary: A bounded real Hermes worker reached terminal completion through a live non-stub OpenAI Codex model path, and the vFinal profile matrix proved live provider/model response for every non-human worker profile.
scope: real Hermes runtime, sanitized worker terminal-completion smoke plus profile-wide live-auth matrix
limits: This proof satisfies only non_stub_worker_execution for the production update preflight.

It does not prove required real tool authentication, tool authorization, specialist output quality, parent done reconciliation, Operator Control Tower readiness, rollback/monitoring or release readiness.
Raw runtime output, local paths, runtime ids, session files and provider logs are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
